title: ABC: Assertion failed - Gia_ManInsertMfs
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Building SaxonSoc available here:
https://github.com/SpinalHDL/SaxonSoc

With instructions documented here:
https://github.com/dok3r/ulx3s-saxonsoc/blob/master/scripts/build.sh

Using following yosys command:
```
synth_ecp5 -abc9 -json bin/toplevel.json
```
Getting following error:
```
4.49.9.4. Executing ABC9_EXE pass (technology mapping using ABC9).

4.49.9.5. Executing ABC9.
Running ABC command: <yosys-exe-dir>/yosys-abc -s -f <abc-temp-dir>/abc.script 2>&1
ABC: ABC command line: "source <abc-temp-dir>/abc.script".
ABC:
ABC: + read_lut <abc-temp-dir>/input.lut
ABC: + read_box <abc-temp-dir>/input.box
ABC: + &read <abc-temp-dir>/input.xaig
ABC: + &ps
ABC: <abc-temp-dir>/input : i/o =   6349/   7794  and =   38507  lev =   76 (6.38)  mem = 0.80 MB  box = 761  bb = 171
ABC: + &scorr
ABC: Warning: The network is combinational.
ABC: + &sweep
ABC: + &dc2
ABC: + &dch -f
ABC: + &ps
ABC: <abc-temp-dir>/input : i/o =   6349/   7794  and =   51288  lev =   32 (4.32)  mem = 0.94 MB  ch = 7296  box = 735  bb = 171
ABC: + &if -W 200 -v
ABC: K = 7. Memory (bytes): Truth =    0. Cut =   60. Obj =  140. Set =  636. CutMin = no
ABC: Node =   51288.  Ch =  6650.  Total mem =   11.05 MB. Peak cut mem =    0.43 MB.
ABC: P:  Del = 4893.00.  Ar =   43144.0.  Edge =    56334.  Cut =   628766.  T =     0.28 sec
ABC: P:  Del = 4893.00.  Ar =   40562.0.  Edge =    53770.  Cut =   600816.  T =     0.29 sec
ABC: P:  Del = 4893.00.  Ar =   17779.0.  Edge =    40722.  Cut =  1336254.  T =     0.56 sec
ABC: F:  Del = 4893.00.  Ar =   12985.0.  Edge =    37536.  Cut =  1227765.  T =     0.55 sec
ABC: A:  Del = 4892.00.  Ar =   12337.0.  Edge =    34716.  Cut =  1200384.  T =     0.87 sec
ABC: A:  Del = 4892.00.  Ar =   12274.0.  Edge =    34569.  Cut =  1217243.  T =     0.74 sec
ABC: Total time =     3.28 sec
ABC: + &mfs
ABC: Assertion failed: iLitNew >= 0 (src/aig/gia/giaMfs.c: Gia_ManInsertMfs: 388)
ABC: Aborted (core dumped)
ERROR: ABC: execution of command "/opt/ulx3s/bin/yosys-abc -s -f /tmp/yosys-abc-pinohi/abc.script 2>&1" failed: return code 134.
make: *** [makefile:41: bin/toplevel.json] Error 1
```
Last known yosys version which works (from somewhere around 2020-03-13):
```
root@260d3effb874:/# yosys -V
Yosys 0.9+1706 (git sha1 c0a00913, g++ 8.3.0 -Os) 
```

First known yosys version which failed to build (from somewhere around 2020-03-19):
```
root@f2ba9151df85:/# yosys -V
Yosys 0.9+1706 (git sha1 0cbf1023, g++ 8.3.0 -Os)
```
So, code changes between 2020-03-13 c0a00913 and 2020-03-19 0cbf1023 introduced the problem.

Note that I tried on latest master version of yosys and got same error.

## Expected behavior

That yosys does not crash with ABC: Aborted (core dumped).

## Actual behavior

Yosys crashes with ABC: Aborted (core dumped).
